patchNotes:
## v0.1.6 - AI & Team Fixes

**Bug Fixes**
- Fixed PVPVE lobby team selection being ignored - players now spawn on the team they chose
- Fixed hero allies always spawning on Team A regardless of owner's team
- Fixed ground-placement skills (totems) being hijacked by the auto-target system instead of entering tile-selection mode
- Fixed Confessor's Shield of Faith self-casting ~56% of the time instead of buffing allies
- Fixed multi-support comps (Confessor + Shaman) clumping together instead of staying near the frontline

**AI Improvements**
- Confessor now tracks and moves toward tanks when they drift out of heal range
- Support roles no longer gravitate toward each other - they prefer tanks/DPS as movement anchors
- Shield of Faith priority adjusted so repositioning happens before buffing
- Exorcism no longer suppressed at medium range (4-5 tiles), only when tank is truly far (>5)
